frameworks.name: Butlin AI-consciousness indicators
frameworks.falsifier: a named indicator has no causal path, or a random control matches its score

frameworks.name: Thaler Creativity Machine / DABUS
frameworks.falsifier: no inverted-U confabulation sweet-spot; valence does not steer learning

frameworks.name: Integrated Information Theory 4.0
frameworks.source: Albantakis et al. 2023, PLoS Comput Biol 10.1371/journal.pcbi.1011465
frameworks.falsifier: partitioning the system does not reduce integration or downstream behavior

frameworks.name: Free Energy Principle / Active Inference
frameworks.source: Kirchhoff, Parr, Palacios, Friston, Kiverstein 2018, J. R. Soc. Interface 20170792
frameworks.falsifier: active policy does not reduce prediction error or improve viability vs controls

frameworks.name: Attention Schema Theory
frameworks.falsifier: removing the schema while keeping attention causes no control/social loss

frameworks.name: CEMI electromagnetic-field integration
frameworks.source: McFadden 2020, Neurosci. Conscious. niaa016; 2025 Front. Syst. Neurosci.
frameworks.falsifier: phase-shuffled fields perform equally well; coherence does not alter behavior

frameworks.name: Unlimited Associative Learning
frameworks.source: Ginsburg & Jablonka; Birch et al., Biol. Philos. 10.1007/s10539-020-09772-0
frameworks.falsifier: entity cannot learn compound/delayed/flexible associations beyond simple conditioning

frameworks.name: Sensorimotor Enactivism
frameworks.falsifier: scrambling action-sensory laws does not reduce perception, planning, or adaptation

frameworks.name: Projective Consciousness Model
frameworks.source: Williford, Bennequin, Friston, Rudrauf 2018, Front. Psychol. 9:2571
frameworks.falsifier: projective frame does not beat flat baselines on perspective/ownership tasks

frameworks.name: Conscious Turing Machine
frameworks.falsifier: competition-broadcast does not improve reportability or stream coherence
